SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Lucy Carrillo-Grubbs #6766. Telephone # 650 872 0769.

Cause came on this day for a Stipulated Settlement to be read into the record.
David J. Cook, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Coast Oil Company, LLC.
Richard Rosenberg, Esq., appearing for Defendants Gas of America, aka Green Petro Gas America, et al.,
Mark S. Mitchell, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Defendants Derek Tominaga and Michael Zhao sworn and examined on their own behalf.
Terms and conditions of settlement read into the record.
Judgment pursuant to stipulation signed in open court.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF COAST OIL COMPANY, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER, ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT (GAS OF AMERICA aka GREEN PETRO GAS AMERICA, a partnership composed of Joe Nianzu Liang, Steven Ming Kong, and Min Zin Zhao; Joe Nianzu Liang, Steven Ming Kong, and Min Zin Zhao, each individually and dba Gas of America aka Green Petro Gas America).

APPEARANCES: David J. Cook, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC 989-4730 for pltf & moving party; Richard D. Rosenberg, Esq. of Rosenberg Law Firm 402-3322 for defts & opposing parties Min Zhao and MD Green Petro, erroneously sued as Min Zin Zhao and Gas of America aka Green Petrol Gas America.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM OR CLAIMS IS A FIXED OR READILY ASCERTAINABLE AMOUNT. CCP SECTION 483.010(a).
PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Continued To May-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF COAST OIL COMPANY LLC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT. Appearances: Nathaniel L. Dunn and David J. Cook of Cook Collection Attorneys (989.4730) for plaintiff and moving party; Richard D. Rosenberg of the Rosenberg Law Firm (402.3322) for defendants and responding parties. Discussed as to the continuance of the matter as it relates to defendant Zhao. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Request for continuance of hearing denied based on improper or untimely notice. Request for continuance due to illness of defendant Liang granted. The court grants a temporary protective order on same basis as its previous order. Hearing continued to May 3, 2011. Opposition brief due April 20, 2011. Courtesy copy must be provided to department 302. No further extensions will be granted. Temporary Protective Order signed in court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
